title: Architectural Analysis & Dependency Check
description: Perform a dependency check on the current Repository to ensure the new 'Calculated' fields don't conflict with existing reporting queries and ensure the Tkinter mainloop remains responsive.
verification_method: Report summarizing dependencies and responsiveness strategy.

title: Database Evolution: Global KPI Splits Table
description: Create 'global_kpi_splits' table in 'db_kpi_templates.db' to store standardized distribution templates.
verification_method: Verify table existence and schema in db_kpi_templates.db.

title: Database Evolution: Add Global Split Reference to Annual Targets
description: Add 'global_split_id' column to 'annual_targets' in 'db_kpi_targets.db' as a non-destructive update.
verification_method: Verify column existence in annual_targets table.

title: Standardized Splits: Implement Global Split CRUD
description: Create service/logic to manage Global Annual Splits templates.

title: Standardized Splits: Refactor Repartition Logic
description: Refactor repartition.py to prioritize Global Annual Splits templates.
verification_method: Automated tests verifying distribution totals match previous logic.

title: Node Engine: Define Serialization Schema
description: Define the JSON schema for serializing KPI calculation nodes and edges.
verification_method: Schema documentation and sample JSON validation.

title: Node Engine: Visual Editor Implementation (Tkinter)
description: Implement a custom Tkinter canvas for visual node editing of KPI formulas.
verification_method: Manual verification of node creation, linking, and serialization in UI.

title: Node Engine: Integration with Annual Target Evaluation
description: Integrate the node-based formula results into the annual.py evaluation logic.
verification_method: Verify calculated targets match expected node results.

title: Smart Data Entry: Hierarchical UI Refactor
description: Reorganize TargetEntryTab to group KPIs by Group/Subgroup using collapsible Frames/Treeview.
verification_method: Manual UI check for hierarchical organization.

title: Smart Data Entry: Auto-population & Visual Feedback
description: Implement auto-population of calculated KPIs and color-coding (light blue for calculated, white for manual).
verification_method: Manual UI check for colors and auto-updates.

title: Smart Data Entry: Manual Override & Priority Logic
description: Ensure manual entries take priority over calculated values and persist correctly.
verification_method: Verify manual values are saved and prioritized in calculations.

title: Validation Layer: Circular Dependency & Integrity Checks
description: Implement checks for circular dependencies in node-based formulas and data integrity validation.
verification_method: Unit tests for circular dependency detection.

title: Node Editor: Role-Based Sockets & Dynamic Connections
description: Refactor node editor to support dynamic input sockets and role-based handles (e.g. Numerator/Denominator).
verification_method: Manual verification of connections and labels in UI.

title: Architecture: Standardized KPI Formulas & Centralized Distribution
description: Move formulas and distribution profiles from annual_targets to centralized KPI definitions.
verification_method: Verify formula persistence in kpis table and usage in repartition logic.

title: UI: Modernized Target Entry with Manual Override
description: Refactor Target Entry UI for side-by-side layout and implement forced manual overrides for calculated KPIs.
verification_method: Manual UI check for layout and live refresh behavior.
